title: Validate T-Deck 16 MB partition map on hardware
description: Validate the expanded LilyGO T-Deck 16 MB flash map on physical hardware. Build-time DTS generation can prove offsets and image size fit, but flashing must still confirm the bootloader accepts the larger image slots, the app boots from slot0, and storage/assets/log partitions do not conflict with ESP32 boot metadata or tooling. Acceptance: capture exact board revision, flash command, esptool/boot logs, booted image evidence, partition map dump if available, and rollback/OTA constraints or file follow-up corrections.
notes: Host-side validation attempt on 2026-06-30: claimed task and checked local macOS serial/USB state. Visible serial candidates remain /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG plus Bluetooth/debug/wlan virtual ports; IOKit identifies A704ESXG as FTDI FT232R USB UART with idVendor 1027 (0x0403), product FT232R USB UART, serial A704ESXG, not native ESP32-S3 USB/JTAG/CDC. Bounded identify command /opt/homebrew/bin/esptool.py --port /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG --baud 115200 --connect-attempts 1 chip_id failed: Failed to connect to Espressif device: Invalid head of packet (0x00). Added dependency on project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.13.1. Cannot flash or validate the 16 MiB partition map until physical T-Deck revision and bootloader/serial access evidence is provided.
